fdi_equity_by_financial_year.unit: USD million (and Rs crore where derivable)
fdi_equity_by_financial_year.note: Total FDI (equity + reinvested earnings + other capital) runs ~1.4-1.5x these figures. FY2021-22 onward derived by differencing consecutive cumulative Annexure-C vintages, cross-checked exactly against the directly-published annual series (47/50 state-years). FY2020-21 from the published all-India total; the state series starts Oct-2019 so it cannot be differenced.

rows.basis: published all-India equity (LS Q.328 total row); not derivable by differencing (state series starts Oct-2019)

iem_by_calendar_year.conversion_note: B/A is a same-period FLOW ratio, not cohort-matched; >100% is a pipeline effect (Part B draws on earlier-year Part A filings)

rows.flag: 2019 Part B EXCLUDED -- source defect: AR2022-23 prints Gujarat 2019 at Rs 15,18,861cr (~6x all-India); AR2021-22's 2019 column repeats the IEM count in the investment cell

year_basis_warning: FDI is FINANCIAL year (Apr-Mar); IEM is CALENDAR year. They are close but NOT coterminous and must not be divided against each other for a precise ratio.
crossover_2024: In CY2024, IEM implemented (Rs 493,765cr) exceeded FY2024-25 FDI equity (Rs 421,929cr) -- domestic industrial implementation overtook foreign equity inflow. Rough, given the calendar mismatch and IEM being manufacturing-only.

sources.fdi: DPIIT Quarterly Fact Sheet Annexure-C vintages Mar-2021..Mar-2026 (Wayback for 2021/2022) + LS Unstarred Q.328 21.07.2026
sources.iem: DPIIT Annual Reports 2021-22..2025-26, Appendix III (Part A) + Appendix V (Part B)
